name: Unlimited Access Limousine
recent_news: No public news found; no public web presence identified for this specific entity at the listed Plantation, FL address.
fit_notes: Micro single-vehicle limo operator (4 employees, ~$273K rev) at a residential Plantation address. No evidence of school-bus or contracted student-transport service. Poor fit as a Summit tuck-in.

name: Yellow Cab Wheel Chair
owner_or_parent: Yellow Cab of Broward (Yellow Cab Broward) - wheelchair/paratransit division
recent_news: Operates as the wheelchair-accessible van dispatch for Yellow Cab Broward (yellowcabbroward.com), 50+ year Broward taxi operator; phone (954) 565-2800 matches Yellow Cab wheelchair dispatch.
fit_notes: Not an independent school-bus contractor - it is the wheelchair/paratransit arm of Yellow Cab Broward, a taxi operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Black Tie Limousine Palm Be
recent_news: Likely a small limo entity; a separately named 'Blacktie Chauffeur & Limousine' (4322 State Dr, WPB; est. 2008, family-owned) is the dominant Black Tie brand in Palm Beach County but uses a different phone/address. The 267 Forest Hill Blvd entity appears to be a small distinct DBA.
fit_notes: Micro limo operator focused on weddings/proms/airport - no evidence of school district contracts or yellow-bus operations. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: FT Lauderdale Limo Inc
recent_news: Listed at 15320 Thoroughbred Ln, Montverde, FL 34756 (a residential address near Orlando, not Fort Lauderdale). Confirmed as a small registered entity per Central Index; no operational web presence, no school-transport footprint found.
fit_notes: Micro shell-like limo entity registered at a residential Montverde address with no evidence of school-bus or student-transport operations. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
